sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_atan2 (id UInt32, x Float64, y Float64, angle Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_atan2 (id, x, y, angle) VALUES (1, 1.0, 1.0, atan2(1.0, 1.0));
INSERT INTO test_atan2 (id, x, y, angle) VALUES (2, -1.0, -1.0, atan2(-1.0, -1.0));
UPDATE test_atan2 SET angle = atan2(y, x) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, x, y, angle FROM test_atan2 WHERE angle > 0;
